step_by_step_reasoning: Analyze the whiteboard and transcript to identify all key architectural components. 1. Caller Carrie is the end consumer initiating voice/chat or email. 2. Amazon Connect handles voice/chat contacts. 3. Connect integrates with a Lambda function for IVR routing logic. 4. This Lambda coordinates with microservices running on ECS. 5. ECS microservices connect to external third-party CRMs (e.g., Salesforce, Siebel). 6. For emails, SES receives them and forwards to a dedicated Lambda which stores the data in DynamoDB. 7. Agent Andy interacts with the ContactSuite application (hosted on ELB/EC2/ASG and featuring SenseIQ KB) via a web browser. 8. ContactSuite writes reporting and session data to RDS.

graph.name: ContactSuite Contact Center Scale Architecture
graph.notes: A scalable contact center solution built around Amazon Connect, ECS microservices, and Amazon SES to manage voice, chat, and email workloads with unified CRM integrations and automated reporting.

nodes.name: Caller Carrie
nodes.notes: End customer initiating voice, chat, or email support requests.

nodes.name: Amazon Connect
nodes.notes: Manages incoming chat and voice contacts.

nodes.name: IVR Routing Lambda
nodes.notes: Executes logic for IVR menus and routing decisions.

nodes.name: ECS Microservices
nodes.notes: Runs backend microservices connecting to external enterprise systems.

nodes.name: CRMs
nodes.notes: Third-party customer relationship systems like Salesforce or Siebel.

nodes.name: Amazon SES
nodes.notes: Handles inbound and outbound emails for the contact center.

nodes.name: Email Handler Lambda
nodes.notes: Processes inbound email content and triggers automation.

nodes.name: Amazon DynamoDB
nodes.notes: Stores metadata and state for processed email interactions.

nodes.name: ContactSuite App (EC2/ELB/ASG)
nodes.notes: Main hosting environment for the ContactSuite portal and SenseIQ KB.

nodes.name: Agent Andy
nodes.notes: Contact center agent accessing the system via browser.

nodes.name: Amazon RDS
nodes.notes: Relational database storing ContactSuite transactional and reporting data.

edges.notes: Customer places voice call or starts a chat.
Connect triggers IVR customer flow logic via Lambda.
Lambda invokes microservices in ECS to fetch context.
ECS microservices retrieve customer profiles from external CRM systems.
SES routes inbound email payloads to a parsing Lambda.
Lambda saves parsed email records to DynamoDB.
Agent logs into the dashboard via browser with MFA.
ContactSuite writes system metrics and agent performance data to RDS.
